title: MetaJudge Package v5.1 (Families A+B+C, clean 7-module package)
description: MetaJudge scoring package v5.1. Clean 7-module package: grading_v2 (8-rule engine), abstention_metrics (UWAA), self_correction_v2 (transition scoring), and task definitions. Import via sys.path.insert(0, '/kaggle/input/metajudge-package-v3').
